zh.Keckwick, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾凱可維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton於1126年11月28日出生在英國英格蘭爾達頓時，他的父親Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton40歲，母親Lady Alice Pichard20歲。他於大約1151年與Lady Alice Prescott在英國爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1199年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年73歲，埋葬在英國爾。

zh-hans.Keckwick, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾凱可維其可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton于1126年11月28日出生在英国英格兰爾達頓时，他的父亲Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton40岁，母亲Lady Alice Pichard20岁。他于大约1151年与Lady Alice Prescott在英国爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1199年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年73岁，埋葬在英国爾。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton was born on 28 November 1126, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton, was 40 and his mother, Lady Alice Pichard, was 20. He married Lady Alice Prescott about 1151, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1199, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 73, and was buried in Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton est né le 28 novembre 1126, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Pichard, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice Prescott environ 1151, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1199, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton am 28. November 1126 in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton 40 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Pichard 20. Er hat um 1151 in Cheshire, England Lady Alice Prescott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1199 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton è nato il il 28 novembre 1126 nel Dutton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Pichard, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice Prescott circa 1151, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1199, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Duttonが1126年11月28日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで生まれた時，父Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Duttonは40歳，母Lady Alice Pichardは20歳であった。約1151年にイギリスチェシュアイアでLady Alice Prescottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1199年にフランスピカーディソンメで73歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton(이)가 1126년 11월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Pichard(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1151년 영국 체실르에서 Lady Alice Prescott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1199년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton nasceu em 28 de novembro de 1126, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Pichard, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice Prescott aproximadamente 1151, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1199, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton родился 28 ноября 1126 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Pichard, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice Prescott около 1151 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1199 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton nació el 28 de noviembre de 1126, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Pichard, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Alice Prescott aproximadamente 1151, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1199, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Cheshire, Inglaterra.
